channel.title: Adrian Marikar
channel.description: Notes, builds, and essays by Adrian Marikar.

item.title: Coolify Docker Compose Volumes and Healthchecks Before You Deploy a Database App
item.description: A practical pre-deploy checklist for Coolify Docker Compose apps that need persistent volumes, database storage, startup order, healthchecks, backups, and safe verification.

item.title: CAA Records for Self-Hosted Sites: Let Let’s Encrypt and Cloudflare Issue Certificates Without Surprises
item.description: A practical CAA record checklist for self-hosted VPS and Coolify sites: allow Let’s Encrypt and Cloudflare certificates, avoid renewal failures, and verify DNS safely.

item.title: Phi Memory Prior Art: Is a Golden-Ratio Memory Governance Layer Actually Novel?
item.description: A prior-art, product-positioning, and implementation note for Phi Memory: a Hermes plugin for phi/Fibonacci AI-agent memory governance with a curl installer.

item.title: Setting Up a Hetzner VPS for Self-Hosting: From Bare Metal to Docker in 30 Minutes
item.description: A practical walkthrough of provisioning a Hetzner Cloud VPS, choosing the right plan, initial server hardening, installing Docker, and running your first self-hosted container on the public internet.

item.title: Cloudflare Tunnel for Self-Hosted VPS Apps: Expose Services Without Opening Ports
item.description: A practical guide to setting up Cloudflare Tunnel (cloudflared) on a VPS to expose self-hosted apps, admin panels, and web services without opening inbound firewall ports. Covers Docker setup, ingress rules, TLS, websocket paths, and common pitfalls.

item.title: GitHub Actions CI/CD for Docker Builds and Coolify Deploys
item.description: A practical guide to building Docker images with GitHub Actions, pushing to GHCR, and triggering a Coolify redeploy via webhook for self-hosted apps on a VPS.

item.title: A Practical VPS Hardening Checklist for Self-Hosted Apps
item.description: An ordered VPS hardening checklist for self-hosted apps: non-root sudo user, SSH key-only logins, UFW firewall, fail2ban, unattended security upgrades, swap, sysctl tuning, loopback-bound admin services, and tested backups.

item.title: NewBizFeed Progress Update: Fresh Company Leads, Fast
item.description: A progress update on NewBizFeed.com: fresh UK and Ireland company-register lead packs, a redesigned public site, moderated listing updates, and the roadmap ahead.

item.title: IndexNow for Static Sites: Submit New Posts After a Coolify Deploy
item.description: A practical IndexNow workflow for static HTML sites deployed with GitHub, Coolify, Docker, and nginx: key file, RSS, sitemap, deploy verification, and safe URL submission.

item.title: Cloudflare DNS for Self-Hosted Coolify Apps: Proxy Web, Protect Mail, Avoid Origin Leaks
item.description: A practical Cloudflare DNS checklist for self-hosted Coolify apps: which records to proxy, which records to keep DNS-only, how to avoid origin leaks, and what to verify after launch.

item.title: Using Multiple Codex Agents to Review Companies House and CRO Data
item.description: How NewBizFeed uses parallel Codex review lanes to turn Companies House and CRO public-register data into safer, more useful company lead packs.

item.title: The RailSide Ratings Evidence Ladder
item.description: How RailSide Ratings separates weak racing signals from stronger evidence using paper tracking, executable-price checks, and promotion guardrails.

item.title: Coolify Static Site Deploy Checklist: GitHub to Nginx Without Stale CSS
item.description: A practical checklist for deploying a static HTML site from GitHub through Coolify and nginx without stale CSS, missed files, broken RSS, or unverified production changes.

item.title: Why RaceEdge Became RailSide Ratings
item.description: A short naming note on why the racing research project moved from RaceEdge to RailSide Ratings and railsideratings.co.uk.

item.title: Horse Racing Tips Research: What RaceEdge Has Learned So Far
item.description: A transparent RaceEdge research update on paper tracking, Betfair delayed pricing, official-price validation, exchange slice candidates, and why most racing signals stay research-only.

item.title: Privacy-Friendly Nginx Log Analytics for a Static Blog
item.description: How to measure real unique visitors on a static nginx blog with access logs, SQLite, salted hashes, bot filtering, no third-party tracking pixels, and no stored raw IPs.

item.title: Docker Mailserver Multi-Domain Setup Without Breaking Existing Mail
item.description: A practical guide to adding a second domain to Docker Mailserver while preserving an existing mail identity, PTR/rDNS, SPF, DKIM, DMARC, TLS, and mailboxes.

item.title: How Email Is Handled on This VPS
item.description: A build log on using Docker Mailserver, DNS, SPF, DKIM, DMARC, Let’s Encrypt, and Himalaya to handle self-hosted email on a VPS.

item.title: How This Blog Is Built and Maintained
item.description: A behind-the-scenes build log on the static HTML, GitHub, Docker, nginx, Coolify, Cloudflare, and Hermes workflow behind adrianmarikar.com.

item.title: RaceEdge: Building a Transparent UK & Ireland Racing Research App
item.description: A build log on railsideratings.co.uk, a real-data UK and Ireland racing research app with explainable scoring, paper tracking, bankroll planning, and Coolify deployment.

item.title: My AI App Factory: Hetzner, Hermes, Coolify, GitHub, Cloudflare, and Telegram
item.description: A practical guide to using a VPS, Hermes agents, Coolify, GitHub, Cloudflare, and Telegram to build and deploy apps with AI.
